name: Andy Wolff - Midcoast Maine
bio:
Before I worked in tech, I worked as an EMT, in hospital emergency departments, and on the railroad. I started building websites and email systems in 2017, and that work eventually led to projects for brands like Hilton, Hyatt, and Wyndham.
Now I build for small businesses here in Maine. I live in Lincolnville and serve as vice chair of the Five Town CSD school board. You work directly with me from the first conversation to launch, no account manager, no handoff, no mystery team in the background.
